checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Ordinances passed by the Sangguniang Panlungsod – 6 copies

steps.client_step: 1. Endorse copies of resolutions and ordinances
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the copies of resolutions and ordinances
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant III (Lipa City Mayor's Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Endorse copies of resolutions and ordinances
steps.agency_action: 1.2. If approved, affix the signature on each and every page of the ordinance. If disapproved, veto the ordinance and return to the Sangguniang Panlungsod with his objections

steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant III (Lipa City Mayor's Office)
